prompt: A realistic fashion-photo style full-body cropped portrait of a {argument name="character type" default="young woman"} shot from a dramatic low angle against a bright blue sky with 2 soft white cloud patches. She is turned mostly away from the camera in a three-quarter back view, looking over her shoulder, with long wavy {argument name="hair color" default="auburn red"} hair falling to mid-back and moving naturally in the breeze. She wears a fitted black ribbed long-sleeve crop top that exposes the waist, olive green cargo pants with a low-rise fit, 5 visible belt-mounted utility pouches around the waistband, 2 visible back flap pockets, and 1 visible side cargo pocket on the left thigh. She also wears a pair of glossy black leather gloves, with one gloved hand raised near her neck and jaw and the other lowered near her thigh. Emphasize a cinematic, confident pose, natural daylight, realistic skin texture, detailed fabric stitching and seams, slightly sensual editorial styling, clean outdoor background, shallow depth of field, sharp focus on the body and clothing, high-resolution photorealism.
translatedPrompt: 一张写实时尚摄影风格的全身裁剪人像，主角为 {argument name="character type" default="年轻女性"}，采用极具张力的低角度拍摄，背景为明亮的蓝天及两片柔和的白云。她背对镜头呈四分之三侧身，回头望向镜头，长长的波浪形 {argument name="hair color" default="红褐色"} 秀发垂至后背中部，在微风中自然飘动。她身穿修身黑色罗纹长袖短款上衣，露出腰部；下身搭配橄榄绿低腰工装裤，腰带处配有 5 个清晰可见的实用小包，后侧有 2 个翻盖口袋，左大腿侧有 1 个可见的工装口袋。她还戴着一副亮面黑色皮手套，一只手抬起靠近颈部和下颌，另一只手自然垂在腿侧。强调电影质感与自信姿态，自然日光，真实的皮肤纹理，细致的织物缝线与接缝，略带感性的编辑风格，干净的户外背景，浅景深，主体与服装焦点清晰，高分辨率写实效果。

breakdown.creativeCore: 低角度红发工装时尚人像：此提示词可生成一张写实风格的低角度户外时尚人像，模特身着黑色短款上衣、手套及战术工装裤，适用于编辑类或角色类图像创作。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: full-body]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, cinematic, editorial]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: shallow depth, depth of field, camera]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
